case_title: JUDY L. MACCHELLO VS. KHAI DONG

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JULY 20, 2017 AT 1:30PM. (SEE ORDER FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MACCHELLO, JUDY L. DBA MACHELLO & ASSOCIATES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DONG, KHAI $2,750.30 PRINCIPAL, $165.00 INTEREST, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,050.30 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT DONG, KHAI HEARING SET FOR FEB-22-2018 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUN-04-2018 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR A PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-15-2018 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 JUDGMENT CREDITOR JUDY MACCHELO IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR KHAI DONG IS PRESENT. PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES, JUDGMENT DEBTOR WILL MAKE $500.00 PAYMENTS ON THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH UNTIL THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. THE NOVEMBER HEARING WILL BE TO DETERMINE IF ONE MORE PROGRESS REPORT IS NECESSITATED FOR COSTS PLAINTIFF INTENDS TO FILE THAT MAY ELONGATE SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF FEB-22-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF DEC-06-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR JUDY MACCELLO. JUDGMENT DEBTOR KHAI DONG IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR STATED THAT HE HAS PAID OFF THE DEBT. INFORMED JUDGMENT DEBTOR THAT A COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT HAS BEEN FILED AND THERE MAYBE A NEW TOTAL AMOUNT. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,436.60 FILED BY MACCHELLO, JUDY L. DBA MACHELLO & ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT DONG, KHAI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-22-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-22-2017 - CONTINUED FOR FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-20-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JUDY L. MACCHELLO APPEARED. DEFENDANT KHAI DONG DID NOT APPEAR. NO FURTHER SERVICE ON THE DEFENDANT IS REQUIRED. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-20-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF NOV-15-2018 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR TO DEC-06-2018 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT.506 FOR FINAL PAYMENT. JUDGMENT CREDITOR JUDY MACCHELLO IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR KHAI DONG IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,000.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $275.03 ACCRUED INTEREST, $720.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT DONG, KHAI
